title: Builder's Paradise
description: Completes many vanilla block families, as well as adding new block types.
body:
![Builder's Paradise Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/233e2bae5c06b74cec3496ee75d0a973b11fc6e1.png) **Builder's Paradise** is a Minecraft mod by **The Works of BH** which aims to complete pre-existing block families by filling in the gaps, as well as creating new block families for you to build with. This mod works with **1.21.4** to **26.1.x**. This mod does _not_ work with **1.21.3 or below**, and I don't plan on porting it to these versions. **__[Download on CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/builders-paradise-expanding-the-block-palette)__** *** # **_Acknowledgements_** [**Startraveler**](https://modrinth.com/user/startraveler) - helped make the textures for the following blocks:
  • Polished Dripstone
  • Dripstone Bricks
  • Polished Calcite
  • Calcite Bricks
  • Basalt Bricks
  • Obsidian Bricks
  • Crying Obsidian Bricks
  • Snow Bricks
  • Ice Bricks
  • Packed Ice Bricks
  • Blue Ice Bricks
  • Smooth Lapis Lazuli
  • Lapis Lazuli Bricks
  • Charcoal Block
  • Coal Bricks
  • Charcoal Bricks
**Lawlite** - helped me fix up the fletching tables' UI [**ChampionAsh**](https://www.curseforge.com/members/championash5357/projects) - helped me get the chiseled bookshelves working properly [**Cassian**](https://modrinth.com/user/Cassian) - helped me with the JEI compatibility [**Vanilla Tweaks**](https://vanillatweaks.net/) - where I got the textures for polished granite, diorite and andesite bricks from **[Iloveflareon](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/jappa-proper-polished-stone-1-15-1-16-1-17/)** - made the polished stone texture As for everything else, that's all me!
